member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.ICircleMapElement
member.summary: Represents a visual element on the map control shaped like a circle.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.ICircleMapElement.Center
member.summary: Gets the center location.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.ICircleMapElement.Radius
member.summary: Gets the radius.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IFilledMapElement
member.summary: Represents a visual element on the map control that has a fill color.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IFilledMapElement.Fill
member.summary: Gets the fill color.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap
member.summary: Represents a that displays a map.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.VisibleRegion
member.summary: The currently visible MapSpan of this Map.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.MapType
member.summary: Gets the display type of map that can be shown.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.IsShowingUser
member.summary: Get whether the Map is showing the user's current location.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.IsScrollEnabled
member.summary: Get whether the Map is allowed to scroll.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.IsZoomEnabled
member.summary: Get whether this Map is allowed to zoom.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.IsTrafficEnabled
member.summary: Get whether this Map is showing traffic information.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.Pins
member.summary: The pins that are to be shown on this Map.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.Elements
member.summary: The pins that are to be shown on this Map.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.Clicked(Microsoft.Maui.Devices.Sensors.Location)
member.summary: Method called by the handler when user clicks on the Map.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMap.MoveToRegion(Microsoft.Maui.Maps.MapSpan)
member.summary: Moves the map so that it displays the specified region.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMapElement
member.summary: Represents an element that can be added to the map control.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMapElement.MapElementId
member.summary: Gets or sets the platform counterpart of this map element.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMapPin
member.summary: Represents a Pin that displays a map.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMapPin.Address
member.summary: The physical address that is associated with this pin.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMapPin.Label
member.summary: The label that is shown for this pin.

member.name: P:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.IMapPin.Location
member.summary: The geographical location of this pin.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.MapType
member.summary: Specify which visual representation should be shown for a map.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.MapType.Street
member.summary: Shows the as a schematic overview of all roads, streets, etc.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.MapType.Satellite
member.summary: Shows the with satellite imagery.

member.name: F:Microsoft.Maui.Maps.MapType.Hybrid
member.summary: Shows the with satellite imagery and a street map overlay.
